de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy

Class AbstractCallStackBasedStopCondition.NodeStartEntry

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.AbstractCallStackBasedStopCondition.NodeStartEntry
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractCallStackBasedStopCondition

    private static class AbstractCallStackBasedStopCondition.NodeStartEntry
extends Object
    Instances of this class are used in AbstractCallStackBasedStopCondition.startingCallStackSizePerGoal to represent the initial Node of Goal on which the auto mode was started together with its call stack size.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Node node
      The initial Node of a Goal on that the auto mode was started.
      private int nodeCallStackSize
      The call stack size of node.
